title: nierembergia minima
intro: Nierembergia minima, also known as the dwarf cup flower, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to South America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nierembergia minima include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
